companies.name: Visiomática S.L
companies.shortDescription:
Visiomática S.L. # Visiomática S.L

Visiomática S.L is a Industrial Machinery Manufacturing company. Visiomática is an expert engineering company focused on providing solutions for quality and traceability in the industrial sector. They specialize in artificial vision, automation, and traceability. With over 20 years of experience, they have a presence in more than 25 countries and offer products prepared to adapt to their clients' needs. Visiomática S.L employs 7 people, founded in 2004. Headquartered in Spain.

## About
Visiomatica, founded in 2004, focuses its activity as an artificial vision engineering and automatisms to offer optimal solutions for QUALITY CONTROL and / or TRACEABILITY at any stage of the production process and in any industrial sector. Our main dedication is to incorporate control systems into your production processes in order to ensure the quality of your products.

companies.name: M3C INDUSTRIAL AUTOMATION & VISION SL
companies.shortDescription:
M3C INDUSTRIAL AUTOMATION & VISION SL. # M3C INDUSTRIAL AUTOMATION & VISION SL

M3C INDUSTRIAL AUTOMATION & VISION SL is a Industrial Machinery Manufacturing company. M3C INDUSTRIAL AUTOMATION & VISION SL employs 3 people (+50.0% YoY, +2 people), founded in 2005. Headquartered in Spain.

## About
M3C INDUSTRIAL is a leading engineering company specializing in machine building and cutting-edge solutions based on machine vision for the food industry, with a particular focus on the cork and wood sectors. We harness advanced technologies such as deep learning and 3D reconstruction to deliver top-tier quality control solutions. Our commitment to continuous research and development positions us at the forefront of the inspection machine market for the cork industry, where we lead with innovative, reliable, and efficient solutions.

companies.name: VISUAL INSPECTION SYSTEMS SL
companies.shortDescription:
VISUAL INSPECTION SYSTEMS SL. VISUAL INSPECTION SYSTEMS SL is a Motor Vehicle Manufacturing company. Visual Inspection Systems is a company specialized in the control of quality through artificial vision. They offer services such as turnkey printing, fine cutting, plastic cutting, decolleté, rubber cutting, and more. With 20 years of experience in the quality control sector, they aim to provide high-value services to the industry. They use advanced technologies to ensure the safety of their clients' products and adapt to a dynamic market. VISUAL INSPECTION SYSTEMS SL employs 2 people, founded in 2015. Headquartered in Spain.
[...]
VISUAL INSPECTION SYSTEMS se dedica al control de calidad de piezas especiales por visión artificial. Trabajamos con todo tipo de materiales cómo piezas metálicas, de plástico, caucho, aluminio, latón, acero, etc. 

Una de nuestras prioridades es poder ofrecer a nuestros clientes una solución fiable y segura a cualquier problemática de calidad o montaje. 
Estudiamos y analizamos cada proyecto con detalle y precisión para garantizar una respuesta adecuada a las necesidades de los clientes.
[...]
Estamos especializados en la verificación 100% de piezas para terceros. Analizamos características dimensionales, estructurales o de tratamiento térmico, grietas, recubrimientos, presencias o ausencias y todo lo que nuestras cámaras de visión artificial puedan
